title: Parquet Files and DuckDB
text: CSV stores one row time: Parquet stores one column time: Survey values together, Year values together, . sounds like minor implementation detail, consequence important: ask Survey Year, Parquet reads two columns disk. 38 columns never touched. Every Parquet file carries footer — compact block binary metadata end file. footer contains: column names column types (INT32, UTF8, DOUBLE, …) number rows row-group boundaries (file split chunks; footer says starts) min/max statistics per chunk, per column DuckDB first connects Parquet file reads footer — kilobytes even file millions rows. knows schema, row count, chunks can skip entirely filter applied. Types recorded file enforced read. INT32 column comes back integer, UTF8 column comes back character — guessing, surprises. reading XML source (dr_get(source = "xml")), parquet file involved ; types applied separately dr_settypes() using dr_lookup_fields table reference. Either way result correctly typed data frame, two paths independent. Within column chunk, values compressed. Parquet supports several algorithms; obus server files use Snappy, fast algorithm optimised decompression speed. Similar values compress extremely well: column string "NS-IBTS" repeated 500 000 times compresses almost nothing. Numeric columns many repeated values (like Quarter, 1–4) shrink similarly. result, measured directly server file freshly written CSV data: full HL table (14,397,334 rows, 30 columns) occupies 97 MB Parquet. Writing identical data plain CSV produces 2.1 GB file — 22 × larger.

what: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_haul
title: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_haul
text: Computes total catch numbers weight per haul per species raw DATRAS HH HL tables. Counts derived TotalNumber weights SpeciesCategoryWeight; haul-level summary fields HL repeated across every length row within species/sex/category group. function deduplicates group level applying DataType-aware scaling aggregating across SpeciesSex SpeciesCategory.

title: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_haul
code: .dr_cpue_by_haul(   hh,   hl,   haulval = "V",   specval = 1L,   zerofill = FALSE,   diag = FALSE )

title: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_haul
text: hh DATRAS haul header table (HH) new-style column names (returned dr_get = "parquet" = "new", dr_con). Required: Survey, Year, Quarter, Country, Platform, Gear, StationName, HaulNumber, HaulValidity, DataType, HaulDuration. hl DATRAS length table (HL) new-style column names. Required: Survey, Year, Quarter, Country, Platform, Gear, StationName, HaulNumber, SpeciesValidity, ValidAphiaID, TotalNumber, SpeciesCategoryWeight, SpeciesSex, SpeciesCategory. haulval Character vector HaulValidity codes retain. Default "V" (valid hauls ). specval Integer character vector SpeciesValidity codes retain. Default 1L (standard species records ). zerofill Logical. TRUE, adds explicit zero rows every haul × species combination species observed somewhere Survey / Year / Quarter absent haul (n_haul = n_hour = w_haul = w_hour = 0). Default FALSE. diag Logical. TRUE, skips aggregation SpeciesSex SpeciesCategory returns deduplicated, scaled table species/sex/category level. Retains DataType, HaulDuration, TotalNumber, SpeciesCategoryWeight alongside derived columns. Useful QC (e.g. spotting inconsistent TotalNumber values unexpected sex/category structure). Default FALSE.

title: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_haul
text: diag = FALSE zerofill = FALSE (defaults), tibble one row per .id × ValidAphiaID: .id 8-field haul key: Survey:Year:Quarter:Country:Platform:Gear:StationName:HaulNumber. .id2 6-field key matching ICES CPUEL join key (lacks Country StationName): Survey:Year:Quarter:Platform:Gear:HaulNumber. Survey, Year, Quarter Survey metadata. ValidAphiaID Valid WoRMS AphiaID. n_haul Total estimated numbers caught per haul. n_hour Total estimated numbers per hour hauling. w_haul Total catch weight per haul (grams). w_hour Total catch weight per hour hauling (grams). w_haul w_hour NA SpeciesCategoryWeight recorded sex/category groups species. Zero-fill rows four columns set 0.

title: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_haul
text: function operates independently .dr_cpue_by_length appropriate choice need haul-level totals (including weights) rather length-disaggregated CPUE. Unlike dr_cpue_by_length, derives counts NumberAtLength, function uses TotalNumber directly — two approaches give counts may differ slightly due rounding submitted data.

what: Calculate CPUE per length class from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_length
title: Calculate CPUE per length class from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_length
text: Computes catch per unit effort (numbers per hour hauling) length class per haul per species raw DATRAS HH HL tables, replicating ICES DATRAS CPUE-per-length product first principles.

title: Calculate CPUE per length class from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_length
code: .dr_cpue_by_length(   hh,   hl,   haulval = "V",   specval = 1L,   zerofill = FALSE,   diag = FALSE )

title: Calculate CPUE per length class from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_length
text: hh DATRAS haul header table (HH) new-style column names (returned dr_get = "parquet" = "new", dr_con). Required columns: Survey, Year, Quarter, Country, Platform, Gear, StationName, HaulNumber, HaulValidity, DataType, HaulDuration. hl DATRAS length table (HL) new-style column names. Required columns: Survey, Year, Quarter, Country, Platform, Gear, StationName, HaulNumber, SpeciesValidity, LengthCode, LengthClass, NumberAtLength, SubsamplingFactor, ValidAphiaID. haulval Character vector HaulValidity codes retain. Default "V" (valid hauls ). specval Integer character vector SpeciesValidity codes retain. Default 1L (standard species records ). zerofill Logical. TRUE, adds explicit zero rows every haul × species combination species observed somewhere Survey / Year / Quarter absent haul. Zero rows carry length_mm = NA n_hour = 0. Replicates ICES CPUEL zero-fill convention. Ignored diag = TRUE. Default FALSE. diag Logical. TRUE, skips final aggregation returns per-row pre-aggregation table, retaining SpeciesSex, SpeciesCategory, NumberAtLength, SubsamplingFactor, DataType, HaulDuration, n_haul, n_hour. Useful inspecting duplicate rows SpeciesSex / SpeciesCategory structure drives aggregation. Default FALSE.

title: Calculate CPUE per length class from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_length
text: diag = FALSE (default), tibble one row per .id × ValidAphiaID × length_mm combination (plus one zero row per absent haul × species zerofill = TRUE): .id 8-field unique haul identifier dr_add_id: Survey:Year:Quarter:Country:Platform:Gear:StationName:HaulNumber. .id2 6-field identifier matching ICES CPUEL product join key (lacks Country StationName): Survey:Year:Quarter:Platform:Gear:HaulNumber. Survey, Year, Quarter Survey metadata. ValidAphiaID Valid WoRMS AphiaID. length_mm Length class millimetres (converted LengthClass via LengthCode). NA zero-fill rows. n_hour CPUE: estimated numbers per hour hauling, summed across SpeciesSex SpeciesCategory. 0 zero-fill rows. diag = TRUE, returns pre-aggregation table additional columns SpeciesSex, SpeciesCategory, NumberAtLength, SubsamplingFactor, DataType, HaulDuration, n_haul.

title: Calculate CPUE per length class from HH and HL exchange data — .dr_cpue_by_length
text: Filters valid hauls (HaulValidity == "V") standard species records (SpeciesValidity == 1) default, applies dr_add_n_and_cpue dr_add_length_mm. Counts aggregated across SpeciesSex SpeciesCategory output row represents unique haul × species × length combination.

text: Numeric Logical Variables: NA: Missing values classified "NA". 0: Values equal 0 (FALSE logicals) classified "0". >0: Positive values (TRUE logicals) classified ">0". <=0: Negative values classified "<=0". title: Haul-level catch totals (numbers and weights) from HH and HL exchange data — dr_hl_haul

what: Zero-filled length-frequency CPUE table from HH and HL exchange data — dr_hl_length
title: Zero-filled length-frequency CPUE table from HH and HL exchange data — dr_hl_length
text: Builds species-annotated, zero-filled CPUE-per-length table raw DATRAS HH HL tables. Joins HH metadata (DataType, HaulDuration), converts length classes centimetres via dr_add_length_cm, computes n_haul n_hour via dr_add_n_and_cpue, annotates species names via dr_add_species, collapses SpeciesSex DevelopmentStage. Every species observed Survey / Year / Quarter receives explicit zero row haul absent, including hauls catch (sourced HH empty hauls missed).
